arts.ttl: Manchester United take unwanted Premier League record after controversial Old Trafford price rise
arts.sum: A number of Premier League clubs charge disabled fans for parking but Man Utd's parking is the most expensive.

arts.ttl: I spotted how Alejandro Garnacho reacted to Antony's goal for Manchester United - it said a lot
arts.sum: Some of the key moments you might have missed from Man United's emphatic 7-0 win over Barnsley at Old Trafford in the Carabao Cup on Tuesday evening.

arts.ttl: Why Manchester United allowed Antony to take their penalty vs Barnsley
arts.sum: Antony scored his first goal of the season from the penalty spot in Man United's 7-0 thrashing of Barnsley in the League Cup.

arts.ttl: Man United FFP prediction made as Erik ten Hag warning sent amid transfer 'net spend' reality
arts.sum: The Red Devils saw a huge number of outgoings at Old Trafford this summer

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Erik ten Hag launches transfer raid as he sends warning to Antony
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured a mixed start to the Premier League season, with boss Erik ten Hag already looking at January transfer targets despite a major summer recruitment drive

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag praises 'big guy' Marcus Rashford after brace against Barnsley - as Man United boss enjoys 'perfect night' with 7-0 Carabao Cup win
arts.sum: United made light work of League One outfit Barnsley, with Alejandro Garnacho, Rashford and Christian Eriksen scored two apiece on top of Antony's spot-kick in a 7-0 thumping.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag calls out player who could be Man Utd's difference maker this season
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford, Christian Eriksen and Alejandro Garnacho each scored a brace and Antony netted a penalty as Manchester United thrashed Barnsley 7-0 in the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: 'Thank God' - Antony sends promise to Erik ten Hag after Man United goal
arts.sum: Manchester United enjoyed a perfect evening at Old Trafford as they beat Barnsley 7-0 to advance in the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: Man Utd boss Erik ten Hag keeping his feet on the ground despite Barnsley rout
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho, Marcus Rashford and Christian Eriksen all scored braces.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag reacts to Man Utd 7 Barnsley 0
arts.sum: Also individual players, Marcus Rashford wants to score goals and that is what I saw. “First of all, it’s most important that we defend well as a team and when we have that right aggressive attitude, then I know that those players will score goals.
